calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Apr-25-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: No appeareance. Plaintiff's Counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to Jul-23-2019 at 10:30 AM in Dept. 610. JUDGE GARRET L. WONG; Clerk JLee. Proceedings not reported. (610) After Hearing Order: Judgment filed, vacate sanction and Jul-23-2019 Order to Show Cause hearing date, Off Calendar, Judgment on file.
